fogra53_ecicmyk.name: FOGRA53 eciCMYK
fogra53_ecicmyk.icc_source: eci.org/en/downloads — download eciCMYK.icc, run: python build_gamut_meshes.py --profile eciCMYK.icc --condition fogra53_ecicmyk --name 'FOGRA53 eciCMYK'
